docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHAU, FONG YOK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick (dept. 611), clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda fields: Ms. Fonk Yok Chau present in court. Original proof of publication dated 7/23/02 was not in the file. Court gets a copy of Ms. Chau endorsed filed copy and places it in the file. Petition for name change is granted.
